front: My life used to be so heartbreaking and depressing. I didn't know where to find love. I had no joy, no passion, and no desire. All of this changed when I heard of the term "six seven". This phrase became more than just a saying. It became my life and helped me navigate through lifes challenges. I used to be homeless but now I live in a 3 story house with my wife marceline and our two kids william and bella. Every 12 hours on the time 6:07 we celebrate and lve in joy. I love this term and it is our life.
back: The human body is honestly just a poorly optimized beta build. Science keeps trying to tell us we have 46 chromosomes, but that’s just because the global elite want to keep your rendering distance low. The moment you unlock the 67th chromosome, the simulation literally starts lagging around you. Carbon is element 6. Nitrogen is element 7. Coincidence? If you fuse them together in your thoughts, your pineal gland starts vibrating at 67,000 RPM. I don’t even ingest calories anymore; I just consume the raw aesthetic data of the digits six and seven. When I walk into a grocery store, the barcode scanners instantly start smoking because my aura is overflowing with numerical dominance. If you aren't actively trying to clip through the geometry of reality using the 67 exploit, you are literally just NPC content.
